metadata.notes: Visa summaries are structured from official immigration guidance for planning only. Users must verify requirements, documents, and processing with Hi Korea or the relevant Korean diplomatic mission before applying.

description: Specific activities work visa for eligible professional roles sponsored by a Korean employer.
processing_time: Varies by occupation, employer, and immigration review; confirm officially.
renewal: Renewal generally requires continued eligible employment and employer support.
notes: Important pathway for professional employment. Occupation code and employer requirements are critical.
